policystrip.title: Commitment to Quality
policystrip.description: At Quandum Aerospace, we understand quality as a fundamental principle of our operations. Our infrastructure operates under the strictest quality controls, ensuring that every process complies with current international standards.

hero.title: Quality Policy
hero.description: The regulatory framework governing each of our precision processes at Quandum Aerospace.

commitment.p1_before: At Quandum Aerospace, quality constitutes a
commitment.p1_after: in the development of our engineering, manufacturing and systems integration activities for the
commitment.p2: Our organisation aligns its processes with the strict fulfilment of the technical, regulatory and contractual requirements applicable to each programme, ensuring the conformity of all products and services supplied.

principles.subtitle: The pillars that guarantee the technical and regulatory conformity of every Quandum Aerospace deliverable.
principles.quote: "Quality is not a stage of the project, but a permanent criterion guiding every technical and organisational decision."

items.title: Regulatory compliance
items.desc: Systems conforming to aeronautical and military standards, ensuring certification, airworthiness and operational safety.

items.title: Process management
items.desc: Controlled planning, execution, verification and validation of every project, with risk management and technical supervision.

items.title: Technical traceability
items.desc: Version and document integrity guaranteed throughout the entire system lifecycle.

items.title: Technical competence
items.desc: Specialised team training to strengthen technological and organisational capability.

items.title: Customer focus
items.desc: Fluid technical communication, transparency and rigour in alignment with programme objectives.

certification.description: Quandum Aerospace operates under the most demanding quality management system in the aerospace sector, integrating the requirements of the international ISO 9001 standard in its defence and aviation variant.

documentos.subtitle: Structural foundations that guarantee operational integrity, process traceability and excellence in the aeronautical sector.
